name: nrm
description: Use the right package manage - remove

options.name: -g
options.description: Operates in 'global' mode, so that packages are removed from the prefix folder instead of the current working directory

options.name: -D
options.description: Package will be removed from your `devDependencies`

options.name: --frozen
options.description: Don't generate a lockfile and fail if an update is needed

generators.custom:
function(n,a){return S(this,null,function*(){var e,d;if(!n.includes("-g")&&!n.includes("--global")){let l=yield a("cat $(npm prefix)/package.json"),m=JSON.parse(l),g=(e=m.dependencies)!=null?e:{},s=m.devDependencies,o=(d=m.optionalDependencies)!=null?d:{};return Object.assign(g,s,o),Object.keys(g).filter(p=>!n.some(T=>T===p)).map(p=>({name:p,icon:"\u{1F4E6}",description:g[p]?"dependency":o[p]?"optionalDependency":"devDependency"}))}else return(yield a("ls -1 `npm root -g`")).split(`
`).map(m=>({name:m,icon:"\u{1F4E6}",description:"Global dependency"}))})}
